questions.question_text_full:
Which of the following letter-clusters should replace # and % so that the pattern and relationship followed between the letter-cluster pair on the left side of :: is the same as that on the right side of ::?

#: XAF :: SVA: %
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: O, P, Q, R, S and T are sitting around a circular table facing the centre(but not necessarily in the same order). P sits second to the left of T. S sits third to the right of Q. Q is not an immediate neighbour of P. O sits second to the right of S. Which of the following represents the position of O with respect of R?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full:
